The Early Treatment Diabetic Retinopathy Study (ETDRS) was developed to standardize the assessment, classification, and reporting of diabetic retinopathy. The primary purpose of this system includes evaluating visual acuity as part of its comprehensive approach to assessing disease severity and progression. Therefore,

Answer D: Classification of diabetic retinopathy Your analysis is correct.
